option.name: text
option.value:
Act as a Senior Android Architect. I want you to perform a deep-code audit of my current project focusing on Snoozeloo.
Task 1: Architecture & Structure Evaluate my folder and file organization. Specifically, check if my implementation of Clean Architecture (Data, Domain, and UI layers) is strictly decoupled. Check if my MVVM/MVI pattern is correctly implemented, focusing on whether the View has leaked into the ViewModel or if the Repository is handling UI logic.
Task 2: Code Quality & Best Practices Scan my Kotlin code for 'code smells' or anti-patterns. Specifically look for:
Correct usage of StateFlow and stateIn for reactive UI.
Effective use of Coroutines and proper dispatchers.
Manual Dependency Injection (AppViewModelProvider) setup efficiency.
Boilerplate code that could be simplified using modern Kotlin features (e.g., UseCase invoke operators).
Please provide a list of Critical Issues, Improvement Suggestions, and Positive Reinforcements for what I have done well.
